nasb.text: who has become such not on the basis of a law of physical requirement, but according to the power of an indestructible life.

esv.text: who has become a priest, not on the basis of a legal requirement concerning bodily descent, but by the power of an indestructible life.

cnv.text: 他成了祭司，不是按著律法上肉身的條例，卻是按著不能毀壞的生命的大能。

csbs.text: 他成为祭司，不是照着有关肉体条例的法则，而是照着那不能毁灭的生命大能，
